channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Engine Officers
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: KSA
Description:

Qualified Chief Engineers, Second Engineers, Third Engineers, ETOs, and Crane Operators are sought for a SPJUB vessel operating on an Aramco project. Minimum experience requirements vary by position, with specific COC and certificate requirements. Joining is upon provisional approval and KSA visa issuance. Salary is to be discussed. Applicants must have valid documents for 12 months and not hold a valid Saudi Iqama visa.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Officers Crane Operator Vacancy on SPJUB Vessel at Aavishka

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge is seeking an experienced Second Engineer with a Chief Engineer Unlimited or Second Engineer Unlimited III/2 CoC. Minimum 24 months of experience as Second Engineer on SPJUB is required. The rotation is 75-90 days on and 60 days off. Immediate joining is available, subject to ARAMCO PAL. All relevant certificates must be valid for at least 12 months.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Second Engineer Job - Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge at Aavishka

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Engineer is sought for a container vessel. The contract duration is 4 months, with potential +/- 1 month variation. Embarkation is scheduled for August 1, 2026. The vessel has a DWT of 52788 and is powered by a SULZER 7RT-flex96C-B engine.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Job on Container Vessel at Columbia Shipmanagement Ukraine Dry Fleet

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 3rd Engineer is sought for an oil/chemical tanker (6000-9000 DWT). Newly promoted candidates or those new to the rank are encouraged to apply, provided they possess valid advanced oil and chemical tanker certifications. Embarkation is required as soon as possible. Key requirements include relevant certifications and experience suitable for the rank.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Engineer Job - Oil/Chemical Tanker at NorteMare LLC

item.description:
Location: Galle
Description:

A VLCC Crude Oil Tanker requires an experienced 2nd Engineer to join in Galle within one week. Previous rank experience on VLCC Crude Oil Tankers and a valid Oil Tanker Endorsement are mandatory. The position offers a salary of USD 10,500.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Job - VLCC Crude Oil Tanker USD 10,500 at Helmsmen Manning services
[Gold Job] KTSHIP - 2eng for oil/chem tank at

item.description:
Location: North Sea
Description:

A Second Engineer with a C/E III/2 ticket is needed for various offshore vessels including SOVs, CTVs, dredgers, and construction vessels. Multiple positions are available for boarding throughout August. Key roles are located in the North Sea, with joining dates starting from July 21, 2026.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Jobs on SOV, Dredger, Offshore Vessels at CrewBase
[Gold Job] Second Engineer for DP2 DSV vessel at
[Gold Job] Chief Engineer for DP2 PSV vessel at
